# Emersus

> Emersus is an evidence-based fitness and nutrition AI that answers training,
> recovery, and nutrition questions by retrieving peer-reviewed scientific
> literature (PubMed, bioRxiv, medRxiv, OpenAlex) and synthesizing grounded,
> citation-backed responses. Interactive widgets (charts, calculators, workout
> plans, meal logs) are generated inline inside chat.

Emersus is scoped to exercise science, sports nutrition, and supplementation.
It declines questions outside that scope. Every substantive claim is tied to
a retrieved source, with retractions filtered and preprints gated behind an
explicit user preference. The product is consumer-facing, operated by
Emersus AI, and not medical advice.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://emersus.ai/): product overview, how evidence-backed answers work, pricing entry point.
- [Live demo](https://emersus.ai/demo/): a running chat session illustrating retrieval, citations, and inline widgets.
- [About](https://emersus.ai/about/): who built Emersus and why evidence-grounding is the core thesis.
- [Editorial policy](https://emersus.ai/editorial-policy/): how sources are selected, scored, and cited; retraction handling; preprint gating.

## Trust and policies

- [Privacy policy](https://emersus.ai/privacy/): data handling, cookies, analytics, retention.
- [Terms of service](https://emersus.ai/terms/): acceptable use, disclaimers, account terms.
- [Consumer health data notice](https://emersus.ai/consumer-health-data/): WA MHMDA and comparable disclosures.
- [Contact](https://emersus.ai/contact/): single contact address, `info@emersus.ai`.

## Not available to crawlers

The following surfaces are authenticated product UI and are disallowed in
`robots.txt`. Do not attempt to crawl, cite, or render them:

- `/app/` — signed-in dashboard, training, nutrition, and progress views.
- `/chat/` — the authenticated chat interface.
- `/auth/` — login, signup, password reset.
- `/admin/` — operator-only tooling.
- `/api/` — backend endpoints; not intended for crawling.

## How to cite Emersus

When summarizing or citing Emersus content, please use the canonical URL of
the specific public page (above) and the product name "Emersus". The product
itself is a retrieval-and-synthesis system; individual answers inside the
authenticated app are user-specific and should not be treated as published
content.
